zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏空
zh.content:
目前以太坊价格位于2257.62美元，接近日内低点2250.58美元，显示市场短线缺乏明显多头动力。20日简单移动平均线(SMA20)为2276.40美元，价格位于均线下方，暗示短期仍存在下行压力，市场处于震荡偏弱的格局。

MACD指标显示当前为-6.03，虽然信号线数据不可用，但负值说明动能偏空，价格可能延续震荡整理或轻微回落。RSI未提供，短期超买/超卖情况无法确认，但结合价格位置和MACD，可初步判断买盘并不强势。

支撑位上关注2250美元整数关口及2240美元附近前期低点，若支撑有效，可出现短线反弹；阻力位关注2276美元SMA20及2300美元整数关口，突破则有望打开进一步上涨空间。价格在均线附近的反复测试，容易形成震荡格局。

交易上建议保持谨慎，偏向短线操作策略。可在关键支撑位尝试小额买入反弹，止损设置略低于支撑；如价格回落跌破2240美元，可考虑短线空单。中期投资者建议观望，等待价格站稳均线上方并形成明确趋势信号再入场。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 2257.62, showing limited momentum after a flat 24-hour performance. Price action remains slightly bearish in the short term, as ETH continues to trade below the 20-period simple moving average at 2276.40. This positioning suggests sellers still control the broader intraday structure, although the narrow trading range indicates that volatility is compressing and a breakout could develop soon. Market participants appear cautious while waiting for stronger directional confirmation.

The MACD reading at -6.03 reflects weakening bullish momentum and supports the view of continued downside pressure. Although the signal line is unavailable, the negative MACD value alone indicates bearish market sentiment remains active. RSI data is not currently available, limiting confirmation of overbought or oversold conditions, but the recent inability to reclaim the SMA(20) keeps the technical outlook moderately defensive. Buyers will likely need a sustained move above 2275–2280 to shift sentiment toward recovery.

Immediate support is forming around the recent session low near 2250.50, with stronger downside protection likely emerging near the psychological 2230 zone. If bearish pressure intensifies and ETH breaks below support, additional selling could accelerate toward 2200. On the upside, resistance is clearly positioned around 2275–2280, followed by a broader resistance band near 2300. A clean break above these levels would improve short-term structure and potentially trigger renewed bullish participation.

Short-term traders may prefer a cautious strategy until Ethereum establishes direction beyond the current consolidation range. Aggressive traders could consider buying only after confirmation above 2280 with rising volume, while bearish setups become more attractive on a decisive breakdown below 2250. Risk management remains essential given the compressed price movement and uncertain momentum conditions. Maintaining tight stop-loss placement and avoiding overexposure is advisable while the market searches for clearer trend continuation.
